name: Paged.js
when_to_use: 需要把长 HTML 按 CSS Paged Media 排成带断页、页码、running header/footer 的打印页时用它而非手写 print CSS,因为浏览器原生在 margin box、跨页计数与复杂碎片化上失败;非做单页屏幕布局或文档编辑器。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能依赖浏览器粗糙自动断页,做不到 @page margin box、running content、跨页计数器和稳定的长表格/图文碎片化;Paged.js 补齐浏览器未实现的分页媒体能力。

data_in._why_no_example: HTML 与 CSS Paged Media 都是 AI 原生记法;schema 已钉死 Previewer.preview 的三个参数,无需另附配置例。
data_in.note: 原生调用是 Previewer.preview(content, stylesheets, renderTo);本条把 content 收窄为 HTML 字符串,stylesheets 只接可抓取的 CSS URL 数组。

schema.html: string —— 要分页的完整、可信或已清洗 HTML 内容
schema.stylesheets?: string[] —— 传给 Previewer.preview 的 CSS URL,默认 [];相对 URL 按当前 document.baseURI 解析

spec.note: 分页预览会生成多张固定纸页;宿主默认 800px 高并滚动,禁止 vh/百分比高。纸张宽高由输入 CSS 的 @page size 决定,不是由宿主高度缩放。

boot.widget: unsupported:Previewer/Polisher 的样式处理依赖 document CSSOM 与全局样式节点,生成规则不会安全穿入 shadowRoot

carriers.widget: unsupported:全局 CSSOM/分页样式与 shadow 样式隔离冲突
carriers.codex: conditional:ESM 与 DOM 分页可在 sandbox iframe 闭环;外链 CSS、图片和字体仍需 CDN 可达与跨域许可

isolation.evidence: +esm bundle: document.head (x1) + createElement('style') (x2) + insertRule (x23) + styleEl (x4) → Polisher injects generated @page/paged stylesheets into document.head and manipulates the document CSSOM; addEventListener x3. Paginated DOM + head-scoped rules cannot be reproduced inside a shadowRoot — catalog widget=unsupported is correct.

minimal.html:
Field Notes

The Architecture of the Printed Page

by A. Compositor · Vol. IV

Paged media asks a different question than the screen: not how content scrolls, but how it settles into fixed sheets — each with its own margins, header, and number.

A page is a frame with rules. Text enters at the top of the content box and fills downward until the box is full, at which point the remainder breaks to a fresh sheet. The running title above and the folio below are painted into the page margins, outside the flow of the text itself.

Because the browser cannot natively compose these margin boxes, Paged.js reconstructs them: it slices the document into page-sized fragments, then draws the header, footer, and page number into the empty margins of every sheet it produces.

On Breaking Well

A good break falls between ideas, never through a heading and its first line. The fragmenter tracks widows and orphans, keeps figures beside their captions, and carries the running title forward so the reader never loses their place.

  • Fixed sheets with real margins and folios.
  • Running headers drawn from the document’s own titles.
  • Counters that know the whole, not merely the part.

What remains on this second sheet proves the point directly: the header above and the page number below repeat, unbidden, on every page the flow generates.

en.when_to_use: Use it to lay out long HTML as printed pages with page breaks, page numbers, and running headers/footers through CSS Paged Media instead of handwritten print CSS, because browsers fail at margin boxes, cross-page counters, and complex fragmentation. Not for single-screen layouts or document editors.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only rely on crude browser auto-pagination and cannot provide @page margin boxes, running content, cross-page counters, or stable fragmentation for long tables and mixed text/images; Paged.js fills the paged-media features browsers have not implemented.

data_in.note: The native call is Previewer.preview(content, stylesheets, renderTo); this entry narrows content to an HTML string and accepts only fetchable CSS URL arrays for stylesheets.

schema.html: string -- Complete trusted or sanitized HTML content to paginate
schema.stylesheets?: string[] -- CSS URLs passed to Previewer.preview; default []. Relative URLs resolve against the current document.baseURI

spec.note: The paginated preview generates multiple fixed paper pages; the host defaults to height 800px with scrolling, and vh/percentage heights are forbidden. Input CSS @page size determines paper width and height; host height does not scale the pages.
